task: Compare Apple watches and  learn more about the ultra version on apple.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the task by navigating to Apple’s Watch section, opening the official Apple Watch comparison page (https://www.apple.com/watch/compare/), and then opening the Apple Watch Ultra 3 page (https://www.apple.com/apple-watch-ultra-3/). The trajectory shows the comparison table with Series 11, SE 3, and Ultra 3, including prices and key specs, and the Ultra 3 page with highlights like satellite communications, battery, display, and health features. The final response accurately summarizes the comparison and Ultra 3 details based on evidence visible in the snapshots and fetched Apple pages.
final_result_response:
I opened Apple’s Watch Compare page and the Apple Watch Ultra 3 page.

## Apple Watch comparison

| Model | Best for | Starting price | Key strengths | Main tradeoff |
|---|---:|---:|---|---|
| Apple Watch SE 3 | Value | $249 GPS, $299 GPS + Cellular | S10 chip, sleep apnea notifications, sleep score, core fitness/safety | No ECG, Blood Oxygen, hypertension notifications, satellite, or premium materials |
| Apple Watch Series 11 | Everyday premium | $399 GPS, $499 GPS + Cellular | Thinner 42/46mm case, 2000-nit Always-On display, ECG, Blood Oxygen, hypertension notifications, 24-hour battery | Less rugged/adventure-focused than Ultra |
| Apple Watch Ultra 3 | Sports/adventure | $799 GPS + Cellular | 49mm titanium, 3000-nit display, dual-frequency GPS, satellite, siren, 100m water resistance, 42-hour battery | Biggest and most expensive |

Apple’s comparison table lists the three current models as Series 11, SE 3, and Ultra 3, with Ultra 3 starting at $799 and offering 42-hour battery life versus 24 hours for Series 11 and 18 hours for SE 3. <citation refs="fetch_call_FtTOyR9LSLlMg1t4SX1c7zgj|fc_050cf6f14db12d62016a044720a4f88198951aa784182afae9#1">Apple lists “Apple Watch Series 11,” “Apple Watch SE 3,” and “Apple Watch Ultra 3,” with “From $399,” “From $249,” “From $799,” and battery ratings of “Up to 24 hours,” “Up to 18 hours,” and “Up to 42 hours.”</citation>

## Apple Watch Ultra 3 highlights

Ultra 3 is Apple’s “ultimate sports and adventure watch.” It adds built-in satellite communications, precision dual-frequency GPS, the longest Apple Watch battery life, and a rugged titanium build. <citation refs="fetch_call_yCYruJi9MZBoZIFotmFKwtl6|fc_050cf6f14db12d62016a044720a5108198b80129e72270a19d#1">Apple says Ultra 3 has “Built-in satellite communications,” is an “ultimate running companion with advanced metrics, training load, and the best GPS in a sports watch,” and has “The longest battery life of any Apple Watch. Up to 42 hours of normal use.”</citation>

Key Ultra 3 features:
- 49mm titanium case in natural or black titanium
- Wide-angle Always-On Retina display, up to 3000 nits
- S10 chip, double tap, wrist flick, on-device Siri, Precision Finding
- Emergency SOS via satellite, Messages via satellite, Find My via satellite
- 100m water resistance, scuba to 40m, high-speed water sports, IP6X dust resistance
- Siren, Action button, dual speakers, three-mic array
- Up to 42 hours normal use, up to 72 hours Low Power Mode, fast charging
- Health: ECG, Blood Oxygen, hypertension notifications, sleep apnea notifications, sleep score, Vitals app

My take: choose SE 3 for price, Series 11 for the best everyday balance, and Ultra 3 if you want the most durable watch with the best battery, GPS, satellite, and outdoor/sports features.
action_history: Opening Apple website: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.apple.com/');
Navigating to Apple Watch page: await page.locator('e11').click();
Opening Apple Watch comparison: await page.locator('e246').click();
Opening Ultra 3 details: await page.getByRole('link', {name:'Learn more, Apple Watch Ultra 3'}).first().click();
